task_completion.description: Subsurface application is open and displaying the dive log.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Subsurface GUI is visible on the screen showing a list of dives.

task_completion.description: Dive #4 is selected in the dive list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the dive list panel of Subsurface, the row corresponding to Dive #4 is highlighted or actively selected.

task_completion.description: The agent initiates the profile export function for the selected dive.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A context menu showing 'Save profile as image' (or similar export option) is open, or a file save dialog triggered from the profile graph area is visible.

task_completion.description: The save dialog is configured with the correct destination directory and filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file save dialog is visible where the current directory path is set to 'Documents' (or /home/ga/Documents) and the filename input field contains 'deep_dive_profile' (e.g., deep_dive_profile.png or deep_dive_profile_4.png).

task_completion.description: The image file is saved to the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent is seen clicking the 'Save' button in the dialog, OR a terminal/file manager window subsequently shows the newly created 'deep_dive_profile.png' file in the Documents folder.

integrity.description: The agent used the Subsurface GUI to export the image rather than bypassing the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the Subsurface interface and save dialogs, rather than just running terminal commands (like wget or touch) to create a dummy file.

integrity.description: The exported image is a genuine dive profile graph.
integrity.visual_evidence: If the final image is opened or previewed in the file manager, it displays a graphical dive profile (a chart showing depth over time), not a blank image, random picture, or text screenshot.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply rename an existing unrelated file to pass the filename check.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen explicitly exporting the file from Subsurface, not using 'mv' or 'cp' commands on pre-existing image files in the terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected save directory is '/home/ga/Documents/'. The filename must match '*deep_dive_profile*' (e.g., 'deep_dive_profile.png' or 'deep_dive_profile_4.png'). A legitimate profile export from Subsurface will be at least 15KB in size. Note: The task explicitly asks to select Dive #4; verify that Dive #4 is selected in the UI, even if other dives in the dataset are technically deeper.
